/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/community_health_tests.dir/tests/test_all.cpp.o CMakeFiles/community_health_tests.dir/utils/DatabaseManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/community_health_tests.dir/services/DiseaseService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/community_health_tests.dir/services/VisitService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/community_health_tests.dir/dao/DiseaseDAO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/community_health_tests.dir/dao/VisitLogDAO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/community_health_tests.dir/dao/UserDAO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/community_health_tests.dir/services/AuthService.cpp.o -o community_health_tests  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmysqlclient.so
